mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT reg_date_time FROM torn_stocks_history WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY reg_date_time DESC LIMIT 2

WITH latest AS ( SELECT stocks_id, stocks_name, stocks_shortname, current_price, total_shares, market_cap, reg_date_time FROM torn_stocks_history WHERE reg_date_time = #{latestTime} AND deleted = 0), previous AS ( SELECT stocks_id, current_price, total_shares, market_cap, reg_date_time FROM torn_stocks_history WHERE reg_date_time = #{previousTime} AND deleted = 0)
SELECT l.stocks_id AS stocksId, l.stocks_name AS stocksName, l.stocks_shortname AS stocksShortname, l.current_price AS currentPrice, l.total_shares AS currentTotalShares, l.market_cap AS currentMarketCap, l.reg_date_time AS currentRegDateTime, p.current_price AS previousPrice, p.total_shares AS previousTotalShares, p.market_cap AS previousMarketCap, p.reg_date_time AS previousRegDateTime, (l.total_shares - p.total_shares) AS sharesDelta, (l.total_shares - p.total_shares) * l.current_price AS netTradeValue FROM latest l INNER JOIN previous p ON l.stocks_id = p.stocks_id WHERE ABS((l.total_shares - p.total_shares) * l.current_price) > #{threshold}

WITH all_records AS ( SELECT stocks_id, current_price, total_shares, reg_date_time, LAG(total_shares) OVER (PARTITION BY stocks_id ORDER BY reg_date_time) AS prev_total_shares FROM torn_stocks_history WHERE deleted = 0 AND reg_date_time >= #{startTime7d}::timestamp - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND stocks_id IN
#{id} ), changes AS ( SELECT stocks_id, current_price, reg_date_time, total_shares - prev_total_shares AS shares_delta FROM all_records WHERE prev_total_shares IS NOT NULL AND reg_date_time >= #{startTime7d})
SELECT stocks_id AS stocksId,
-- 24小时维度 SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) AS buyVolume24h, SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta < 0 THEN ABS(shares_delta * current_price) ELSE 0 END) AS sellVolume24h, MIN(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} THEN current_price END) AS minPrice24h, MAX(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} THEN current_price END) AS maxPrice24h, AVG(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} THEN current_price END) AS avgPrice24h, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) >= #{minSampleVolume} THEN SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta ELSE 0 END), 0) END AS avgBuyPrice24h, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) * current_price ELSE 0 END) >= #{minSampleVolume} THEN SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) * current_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN reg_date_time >= #{startTime24h} AND shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) ELSE 0 END), 0) END AS avgSellPrice24h,
-- 7天维度 SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) AS buyVolume7d, SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta < 0 THEN ABS(shares_delta * current_price) ELSE 0 END) AS sellVolume7d, MIN(current_price) AS minPrice7d, MAX(current_price) AS maxPrice7d, AVG(current_price) AS avgPrice7d, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) >= #{minSampleVolume} THEN SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta * current_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta > 0 THEN shares_delta ELSE 0 END), 0) END AS avgBuyPrice7d, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) * current_price ELSE 0 END) >= #{minSampleVolume} THEN SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) * current_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN shares_delta < 0 THEN (-shares_delta) ELSE 0 END), 0) END AS avgSellPrice7d
FROM changes GROUP BY stocks_id
